component.name: SynchroSonic
component.summary: Linux-first LAN audio casting and receiver control

description.p: SynchroSonic is a Linux-first GTK4/libadwaita desktop application for capturing system audio, discovering receivers, casting over the local network, running a receiver mode, and inspecting stream, sync, and buffer health.

The current release track focuses on Linux PipeWire tooling, LAN transport, and explicit diagnostics. Bluetooth support is intentionally limited to selecting local Linux playback outputs exposed by PipeWire.
